message:
fix(codegen): Add VM fallback pre-pass for proper variable discards

Add vm_fallback_analysis.zig that pre-scans function bodies to identify
variables used only in VM fallback expressions (like complex.__eq__(f, x)).

The pre-pass detects:
- Type dunder method calls (complex.__eq__, operator.add, etc.)
- Lambda expressions that capture outer variables

This allows emit of discards immediately after variable declaration
rather than at scope exit, fixing "unused local constant" errors for
variables declared inside loops that are only used in eval() strings.

Fixes test_complex "unused local constant" errors for f, z, mult.
